summary: TemaDom Phase 3 Iteration 17 - Complete testing of new features. All backend endpoints (21/21 passed) and frontend UI elements verified. Key features working: AI Designer page with upload/params/style/generate flow, Feedback page at /feedback with star rating, Subscriptions page with Base/Pro/Premium for companies + AI Designer separate module, Dark theme throughout (#1E2A38), Navbar logo at 120px height, Footer with logo.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/feedback - returns feedback list with avg_rating, total
✅ POST /api/auth/register company without bulstat - correctly rejected 400
✅ Hero promo banner 'ТЕСТОВ РЕЖИМ — ВСИЧКИ ФУНКЦИИ БЕЗПЛАТНИ'
✅ More dropdown with AI Designer and Feedback links
✅ Feedback button (purple, bottom-left at x=24, y=1008)
✅ Feedback modal with 5 stars, name input, text area, submit button
✅ AI Designer page with PageInstructions, upload area, 4 step indicators
✅ Feedback page at /feedback with star rating form
✅ Feedback page shows avg rating and total reviews
✅ Subscriptions page with Базов/Про/Премиум plans for companies
✅ Subscriptions page with AI Дизайнер as separate module
✅ Registration page 3 tabs: Клиент, Фирма / Майстор, Дизайнер
✅ Footer has 2 TemaDom logos (content section + bottom center)
✅ Total 3 logos on page (navbar + footer x2)
✅ Dark theme consistent across all tested pages
critical_code_review_comments: AI Designer endpoint properly validates required image parameter
Subscription plans correctly structured: company (basic/pro/premium) + designer separate
Registration validates bulstat for company type (9 digits required)
Navbar logo at 120px height as per requirement
18 Bulgarian stores list available (BG_STORES in server.py)
PageInstructions component used on AI Designer, Feedback, Subscriptions pages
seed_data_creation: Test users created via pytest registration tests (client, master, company with bulstat, designer)
context_for_next_testing_agent: TemaDom Phase 3 Iteration 17 fully tested. NEW features verified: 1) AI Designer at /ai-designer with upload/params/style/variants flow (real GPT Image 1 generation - endpoint takes 30-90 sec), 2) Feedback page at /feedback with star rating + reviews list, 3) Subscriptions page with Base/Pro/Premium for companies + AI Designer as separate paid module, 4) Navbar logo at 120px height, 5) Footer with logo at bottom, 6) 18 Bulgarian stores for materials (BG_STORES). All APIs working: /api/ai-designer/generate (POST), /api/ai-designer/gallery (GET), /api/feedback (POST/GET), /api/subscriptions/plans (GET).

ai_designer_page.details: Page loads with PageInstructions, upload area, 4 step indicators, test mode banner

ai_designer_api_generate.details: POST /api/ai-designer/generate validates image required, returns 400 without image

feedback_page.details: Page at /feedback with 5-star rating, name input, text area, submit button

feedback_api_get.details: GET /api/feedback returns feedback list with avg_rating and total

subscriptions_page.details: Shows Базов/Про/Премиум for companies, AI Дизайнер as separate module, all 'Тестов режим'

footer_logo.details: 2 logos in footer - content section and bottom center

feedback_button_floating.details: Purple button (#8C56FF) at bottom-left, opens modal with 5 stars

more_dropdown_feedback_link.details: More dropdown includes 'Обратна връзка' link to /feedback

page_instructions.details: PageInstructions component on AI Designer, Feedback, Subscriptions pages

registration_bulstat_validation.details: Company registration requires 9-digit bulstat, correctly rejects without it
